experiment.name: concise_system_prompt_vs_none
experiment.description: Testing whether an explicit conciseness-focused system prompt reduces token usage while maintaining answer quality compared to no system prompt.

diff.description: no system prompt vs explicit conciseness instruction prompt

agent_b.name: variant_v1
agent_b.system_prompt: You are a concise Q&A assistant. Answer in as few words as possible while remaining accurate and complete. Use short sentences. No preamble, no filler phrases, no repetition of the question. If a single word or number suffices, give only that.

tasks: What is the capital of Australia?
Explain the difference between TCP and UDP in networking.
A store sells apples for $1.50 each. If I buy 7 apples and pay with a $20 bill, how much change do I get?
What are three common causes of a Python KeyError exception?
Who wrote the novel '1984' and in what year was it published?
